page_content:
MUED216 Percussion Technique and Pedagogy (2 Credits)

Playing experience on percussion instruments. Historical and acoustical background. Scoring for percussion. Principles of improvisation. Basic concepts of teaching. Methods and materials. Techniques of individual and class instruction.

Restriction: Must be in Music Education program.

MUED217 Brass Instrument Technique and Pedagogy (2 Credits) Playing experience on instruments of the brass family. Historical and acoustical background. Principles of improvisation. Basic concepts of teaching. Methods and materials. Techniques of individual and class instruction.
